title: schismus calycinus var. minutus
intro: Schismus calycinus var. minutus, also known as the lesser six-hair grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Schismus calycinus var. minutus include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin conditions, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health issues, including skin problems and infections.
